name: Hot Three Pepper Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine chopped peppers and vinegar.
2. In a small bowl, mix pectin crystals with 1/4 cup of the sugar.
3. Slowly stir the pectin mixture into the peppers.
4. Cook over high heat until the mixture comes to a full boil.
5. Stir in the remaining sugar.
6. Cook and stir until the mixture returns to a boil.
7. Continue stirring and boiling hard for 1 minute.
8. Skim off any foam.
9. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Pour into sterilized jars and seal with new two-piece lids or hot paraffin wax.
Makes about 5 cups.
